mapper.select: SELECT A.PRDCT_MK_CD ,A.PRDCT_CD , A.BZTY_CD , COALESCE(Z.CTGRY_SYS_CD,'') AS CTGRY_SYS_CD , COALESCE(Z.CTGRY_SYS_NM,'') AS CTGRY_SYS_NM , '' AS FUND_CLS_CD , CASE A.PRDCT_MK_CD WHEN 'BP1005' THEN CAST(CRD.ALLIANC_CD AS VARCHAR(10)) ELSE '' END AS PRDCT_SUB_CD , A.PRDCT_NM , '' AS FUND_CLS1_NM , '' AS FUND_CLS2_NM , '' AS FUND_CLS3_NM , A.PRDCT_FTUR_KR , C.CD_NM AS PRDCT_MK_NM FROM MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_CMMN A INNER JOIN SUB_CD C ON A.PRDCT_MK_CD = C.CMMN_CD||C.SUB_CD LEFT JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_DPST DST ON A.PRDCT_CD = DST.PRDCT_CD AND DST.ENTRNC_TYPE_CD LIKE '%CHN001%' LEFT JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_TRUST TRT ON A.PRDCT_CD = TRT.PRDCT_CD AND TRT.ENTRNC_TYPE_CD LIKE '%CHN001%' LEFT JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_LOAN LON ON A.PRDCT_CD = LON.PRDCT_CD AND LON.ENTRNC_TYPE_CD LIKE '%CHN001%' LEFT JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_INSRNC ISR ON A.PRDCT_CD = ISR.PRDCT_CD AND ISR.ENTRNC_TYPE_CD LIKE '%CHN001%' LEFT JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_CARD CRD ON A.PRDCT_CD = CRD.PRDCT_CD AND CRD.ENTRNC_TYPE_CD LIKE '%CHN001%' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CT2.PRDCT_CD , CT1.CTGRY_SYS_CD , CT1.CTGRY_SYS_NM FROM MA30_PRDCT_CTGRY_SYS CT1 INNER JOIN MA30_FNANCL_PRDCT_CTGRY CT2 ON CT1.CTGRY_SYS_CD = CT2.CTGRY_SYS_CD WHERE CT1.USE_YN = 'Y' AND CT2.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SUB_CD = 'CHN001' AND CT1.PRDCT_MK_CD = 'BP1001' ) Z ON A.PRDCT_CD = Z.PRDCT_CD WHERE A.PRDCT_LANG_CD = #{loctnCd} AND A.PRDCT_MK_CD <> 'BP1006' AND A.USE_IND = 'Y' AND A.SALE_FLG_CD = 'SE1001' AND A.APP_STATUS = 'PF4005' AND C.CMMN_CD = 'BP1' AND (COALESCE(A.SALE_START_DT,'20190101')||COALESCE(A.SALE_START_TM,'00') <= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24') AND COALESCE(A.SALE_END_DT,'99991231')||COALESCE(A.SALE_END_TM,'00') >= VARCHAR_FORMAT(CURRENT TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24')) AND (UPPER(A.PRDCT_NM) LIKE UPPER('%'||#{searchWord}||'%')) ORDER BY PRDCT_MK_CD WITH UR
